name: [InfraAdvisor] MCP External API Error Rate Elevated
message:
## MCP External API Error Alert

**Source:** {{source.name}}
**Error count in last 5 min:** {{value}} (threshold: 5)

The InfraTools MCP server is experiencing elevated error rates calling external APIs.

**Affected source:** {{source.name}}
- `epa_sdwis` — EPA Envirofacts SDWIS endpoint is unavailable or rate-limiting
- `twdb` — Azure AI Search is unavailable or returning errors
- `fhwa_nbi` — ArcGIS NBI FeatureServer is unavailable
- `openfema` — OpenFEMA API is unavailable
- `eia` — EIA API key expired or endpoint unavailable

**Remediation:**
1. Check MCP Server dashboard for error trend
2. Verify external API health:
   - EPA: https://enviro.epa.gov/enviro/efservice
   - FEMA: https://www.fema.gov/api/open
   - EIA: Check `EIA_API_KEY` secret in K8s
3. Check pod logs: `kubectl logs -n infra-advisor deploy/mcp-server`

@slack-infra-advisor-alerts
